entry.data:
PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE MID 50S
NORTHEAST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S
EAST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH, BECOMING SOUTHWEST IN THE AFTERNOON

CLEAR
LOWS IN THE LOWER 60S
SOUTH WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S
SOUTHWEST WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 25 MPH

MOSTLY CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS IN THE EVENING, THEN MOSTLY CLEAR AFTER MIDNIGHT
MUCH COOLER WITH LOWS AROUND 40
NORTH WINDS 15 TO 20 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 30 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 30 PERCENT

MOSTLY SUNNY
MUCH COOLER WITH HIGHS IN THE UPPER 50S

MOSTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE LOWER 40S
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 60S

PARTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 70S

MOSTLY CLOUDY IN THE EVENING, THEN BECOMING PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE MID 50S

PARTLY CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS
LOWS AROUND 50
CHANCE OF RAIN 40 PERCENT

PARTLY SUNNY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS IN THE MORNING
MUCH COOLER WITH HIGHS IN THE LOWER 60S
CHANCE OF RAIN 40 PERCENT
